title: Claudian: bring Claude Code or Codex into an Obsidian vault
friendlyTitle: Claudian: use coding AI inside your Obsidian notes
summary: Claudian is an Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code and Codex as collaborators in a knowledge vault. The TypeScript project has about 14,000 stars and shipped version 2.0.34 on July 13.
friendlySummary: Claudian is an Obsidian plugin that lets people use Claude Code or Codex with their notes and project files. It has a fresh update and is popular on GitHub.
whyItMatters: It can help Obsidian users bring AI-assisted writing, editing, and coding tasks closer to their notes and project context. Review the plugin’s permissions and provider setup before giving any agent access to a personal vault.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It may make it easier to work with AI while staying in your note app. Check what the plugin can access before connecting it to private notes.
